sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'SELECT TemplateId, TemplateName
FROM transform.TemplateStore
WHERE TemplateId = ',
string(activity('lkp_get_integration_config').output.firstRow.TransformTemplateId),
' AND IsActive = 1'
)
